meaning: n.巴比特(美国小说家辛克莱.刘易士所著同名小说的主人公,典型的资产阶级市侩),市侩
examples: Babbitt paid his bill, said adequately.
Then babbitt slid into a sea of eloquence.
That's the charge against Interior Secretary Bruce Babbitt, regarding a gaming license for some Chippewa Indians.
Your low point was reached with Bruce Babbitt, Bill Clinton's Secretary of the Interior.
